configurations.name: windows-gcc-x64
compilerArgs: --std=gnu17 -xc -fdata-sections -ffunction-sections -fdiagnostics-color=always -w -Wextra -Wno-unused-parameter -O0 -g3 -DFOUR_AXIS_FLIGHT -DFOUR_AXIS_FLIGHT_VERSION=\"1.0.0\" -D__KERNEL__ -DCONFIG_FAKE_LIB -DCONFIG_SIMULATION -DUSE_HAL_DRIVER -DSTM32F407xx -fdiagnostics-color=always -I include -I include\uapi -I arch\arm\include -I arch\arm\include\uapi -I arch\arm\include\generated -I arch\arm\include\generated\uapi -I arch\arm\mach-stm32 -include generated\deconfig.h -include kinetis\step-debug.h
